checks.pattern: // Evidence: feed-go-revision-baseline-1kif4m(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?func\s+evidence_feed_go_revision_baseline_1kif4m\s*\([^)]*\)\s*\(bool,\s*int,\s*string\)\s*\{(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?goVersion != 12605)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?pinnedDependencies < 3)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?cleanGates < 9)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?unresolvedFindings > 0)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return)(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return
checks.description: The increment includes the required executable or reviewable evidence structure.
checks.failureMessage: Complete the full function, prompt contract, or gate record shown in the brief.

checks.description: The decision applies Feed Go Revision Baseline to the changed stakeholder case.
checks.failureMessage: Recheck the conditions and reject the documented misconception about Feed Go Revision Baseline.

checks.description: The evidence note explains the model, failure risk, and verification in the learner’s own words.
checks.failureMessage: Add a causal explanation using capture and revision plus specific case evidence.
